title: Match-first statement reconciliation sequence
content: Ingest->>CLI: evidence.register approved normalized statement row
CLI->>DB: commit evidence or return identical logical replay
CLI->>DB: read active unreconciled compatible and guard state
DB-->>Ingest: candidates, rejections, conflicts, advisory token
Recon->>DB: BEGIN IMMEDIATE and revalidate current state
else one compatible event with authoritative differences
alt relationship remains valid or none exists
Recon->>DB: carry category/pool; carry payment or set unknown
Recon->>DB: replace valid relationship + append decision/link
Recon->>DB: append review exception only; no replacement
else no candidate and no guard candidate
Recon->>DB: create statement-only fact + decision + link
Recon->>DB: commit complete effect + idempotency outcome
DB-->>Ingest: structured outcome with one active effect
CLI->>DB: derive counts, absent prior facts, exceptions
DB-->>Ingest: batch summary and exception list
